mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('conversation_turn_seq')
INSERT INTO conversation_turn (id, entry_id, role, content, step_type, turn_order) VALUES (#{id}, #{entryId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{stepType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{turnOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, entry_id, role, content, step_type, turn_order FROM conversation_turn WHERE entry_id = #{entryId} ORDER BY turn_order
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM conversation_turn WHERE entry_id IN (SELECT id FROM journal_entry WHERE user_id = #{userId})
